hero_desc: Providing skilled and unskilled labor including Helpers, Welders, Fitters, Riggers, and Housekeeping staff for industrial projects across India.
core_desc: We don't just supply labor; we deploy technical assets. Every professional in our roster is vetted for specific industrial rigor.
core_skilled_desc: We provide a versatile workforce tailored to your factory needs, from experienced welders and fitters to dedicated helpers and housekeeping staff.
core_supervision_desc: On-site leadership including Safety Officers (NEBOSH/IOSH) and Site Supervisors ensuring zero-harm operations.
core_riggers_desc: Expertise in heavy lifting, signal coordination, and complex structural erection sequences.
core_fitters_desc: Mechanical and structural fitters trained in blueprint reading and precision alignment.
core_compliance_desc: Protecting your project from liability through strict adherence to labor laws.
vetting_desc: We follow a 4-stage technical verification process to ensure every worker exceeds industry benchmarks before they reach your site.
step1_desc: Rigorous verification of ITI certificates, previous experience letters, and skill testing records.
step2_desc: Practical workshop testing including coupon welding and blueprint reading evaluations.
step3_desc: Full occupational health check-ups to ensure fitness for high-altitude and confined-space work.
step4_desc: Mandatory EHS induction and specialized tool-handling orientation before mobilization.
welfare_title: Welfare is not an option; it's our foundation.
welfare_desc: We believe that a protected workforce is a productive workforce. Shreeji Construction maintains absolute transparency in all statutory obligations.
welfare_esic_desc: Real-time contribution updates for every deployed worker.
welfare_insurance_desc: Comprehensive group insurance policies covering all industrial risks.
welfare_accom_desc: Dignified housing facilities meeting all safety and hygiene regulations.
cta_desc: Whether you need a skilled welding and fabrication crew, industrial helpers, or a complete site management team, Shreeji Construction provides the precision and compliance you demand.
form_section_desc: We are constantly seeking skilled welders, precision fitters, millwright mechanics, electricians, riggers, and helper personnel. Submit your application below, and our compliance and safety team will review your credentials for upcoming industrial deployments.
placeholder_notes: DESCRIBE YOUR PREVIOUS DEPLOYMENTS OR CERTIFICATIONS...
